Goa court denies bail to Luthra brothers in forgery case linked to Birch nightclub fire
articles.description: Goa court denies bail to Luthra brothers in forgery case linked to Birch nightclub fire that killed 25; probe into  ₹22 crore assets continues.

articles.title: Quirky campaign tactics mark West Bengal Assembly election push
articles.description: From kitchen visits to barber shop stunts, candidates across parties attempt unconventional voter connect ahead of the West Bengal Legislative Assembly election

articles.title: What is Karnataka’s new draft policy for digital well-being all about?
articles.description: The policy recommends that schools incorporate digital well-being and social media literacy in their curriculum.

articles.title: Acquire additional skills along with obtaining a degree, students told
articles.description: Founder-director of Insights IAS Vinay Kumar G.B. says degrees alone cannot guarantee employment in a rapidly changing world

articles.title: No fuel shortage in Mysuru region, public urged not to resort to panic-buying

articles.description: The toll rates will be revised at 58 of the 69 toll plazas across the State starting from April 1, according to NHAI

topStories.title: Two Cuba-bound aid ships missing after leaving Mexico
topStories.description: Mexico's navy launches a rescue mission for ships delivering aid to Cuba, strained by food and fuel shortages amid a US embargo.

topStories.description: Supreme Court warns of “general indifference” as case records reveal disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity, violating IPC Section 228A

topStories.title: TN elections will be a close battle: Chidambaram
topStories.description: The upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly election will be a close contest between two strong fronts and not a one-sided battle like the 2024 parliamentary elections, according to veteran Congress leader and former Union Minister P Chidambaram. In an interview with The Hindu, he also disagreed with DMK and AIADMK’s proposition that the people of Tamil Nadu will never agree to a coalition government.

topStories.description: The US television presenter will return to hosting her NBC News programme in April.

topStories.description: The strike - which killed at least 168 people, mostly children - "evoked a visceral horror", Volker Türk said.

dailyNews.title: Will ICE Change Under Its New Leader?
dailyNews.description: Markwayne Mullin, the new homeland security secretary, has promised a different approach, but how much change is likely? Our reporter Hamed Aleaziz describes what we know.

dailyNews.description: Some conservative sheriffs have raised concerns about the aggressive enforcement tactics that Gov. Ron DeSantis, a Republican, has embraced.

dailyNews.title: UAE and Qatar Arrest Hundreds Over Online Videos of Iranian Attacks
dailyNews.description: The authorities have made a wave of arrests to stop people posting footage of strikes, citing security risks. Experts also see a fear of damage to the countries’ image as safe havens.

dailyNews.description: A jumble of emissaries — a friend, a family member, a dove and a hawk — on the Iran crisis reflects President Trump’s improvisational approach.

dailyNews.description: President Trump said on Thursday he would delay an imminent deadline to begin attacking Iran’s power grid.

dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth’s highly unusual decision to remove officers from a one-star promotion list has spurred allegations of racial and gender bias.

dailyNews.description: President Trump is poised to be the first sitting president to have his signature appear on the U.S. dollar.

dailyNews.description: Since the start of the war in Iran, the average price of gas in the United States has climbed by nearly a dollar.

dailyNews.description: After a fatal collision between an Air Canada jet and a fire truck on a runway, attention has focused on why the truck didn’t heed frantic calls to stop.

topStories.title: Europeans Are Angry at Trump, but Often Forgiving of Americans
topStories.description: A generation ago, foreign fury over the Iraq invasion often blurred into anti-Americanism. Now, some Europeans seem ready to distinguish between the president and the American people.

topStories.title: ‘No Kings’ Protests Across U.S. Cities: What We Know
topStories.description: Thousands of demonstrations against the Trump administration are scheduled to take place in cities and towns across the country on Saturday.

topStories.title: Iran halts 3 ships in Strait of Hormuz, rejects Trump's diplomacy claims
topStories.description: As Trump again postpones his ultimatum to Iran and claims talks are "going very well," Tehran says he's lying and blocks 3 ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Latest news on Iran war as Trump extends Strait of Hormuz deadline and world awaits next moves
topStories.description: President Trump announced an extension to his deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz as he insists that diplomatic efforts are working. Meanwhile, Iran is pushing back on Mr. Trump's rhetoric. CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Holly Williams report.

topStories.title: Trump's signature to be added to new U.S. paper currency
topStories.description: The Treasury Department announced it is adding President Trump's signature to new U.S. paper currency. Historically, the bills only have the signatures of Treasury officials. The change is expected later this year.

topStories.title: Trump says he's extending a pause on Iran energy site strikes
topStories.description: President Trump said he's postponing attacks on Iran energy infrastructure for 10 days at Iran's request. While Mr. Trump says talks are going well, Iran denies any direct negotiations. Ed O'Keefe reports.

topStories.title: Senate approves most funding for DHS after Trump vows to restart pay for TSA officers
topStories.description: On Friday, the Senate unanimously voted to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security. Transportation Security Administration workers and other federal workers within DHS would receive paychecks again, but funding for ICE is not included in the package. The agreement came hours after President Trump said he would sign an executive order to immediately pay TSA officers. The bill now heads to the House.

dailyNews.title: Airport lines are out-of-control. Trump can save us from TSA insanity — forever
dailyNews.description: Atlanta airport passengers waited five hours in TSA lines while Orlando's privatized security averaged 30 minutes, making the case for ending the government monopoly.

dailyNews.title: Hollywood union praises Trump's AI policy as 'protections for human creativity'
dailyNews.description: SAG-AFTRA supported the Trump administration's national AI policy framework, calling for strong protections for members' performances and likenesses from misuse.

dailyNews.title: Brent oil tops $110 again after Chinese ships are turned away from Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: David Sacks says his time as Trump's crypto and AI czar has ended
dailyNews.description: The venture capitalist said he will still be a part of the White House's Technology committee and will help push Trump's AI plan forward.

dailyNews.title: Anthropic wins preliminary injunction in DOD fight as judge cites 'First Amendment retaliation'
dailyNews.description: A federal judge in San Francisco granted Anthropic's request for a preliminary injunction in its lawsuit against the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Why Trump says he extended Iran deadline
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Melania Trump showcases robot guest at WH summit
dailyNews.description: A walking, talking humanoid robot strolled side-by-side with first lady Melania Trump at the White House for the second day of her international technology summit.

dailyNews.title: Trump Delays Strikes on Iran's Energy Sector for 10 More Days
dailyNews.description: After nearly one month of war, the United States, Israel and Iran are continuing to trade air and drone strikes. Now President Donald Trump says they’re also trading potential peace plans but Iran is continuing to publicly dispute that any talks are underway. It comes as the president is extending a deadline he gave Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz of face attacks against its power plants. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY from the White House.
